# Typed Steps

Choose typed workflow steps by workflow phase and task-oriented group.

Use these pages when you are deciding which kind to author. For shared step envelope rules, see [Step Envelope Contract](workflow-model.md#step-envelope-contract). For top-level workflow and component document contracts, see [Workflow Model](workflow-model.md#workflow-schema-contract) and [Workspace Layout](workspace-layout.md#component-fragment-contract).

## Prepare

Use these kinds in prepare workflows that produce bundle artifacts or collect local preflight facts.

| Group | Step Kinds | When to use |
|---|---|---|
| [Files and Archives](typed-steps/prepare/files-archives.md) | [DownloadFile](typed-steps/prepare/files-archives.md#downloadfile) | Use this group for file artifacts, node-side file placement, archive extraction, and structured or textual file edits. |
| [Packages and Repositories](typed-steps/prepare/packages-repositories.md) | [DownloadPackage](typed-steps/prepare/packages-repositories.md#downloadpackage) | Use this group for package workflows that start with prepare-time package staging and finish with apply-time repository setup and installation. |
| [Container Images](typed-steps/prepare/container-images.md) | [DownloadImage](typed-steps/prepare/container-images.md#downloadimage) | Use this group when image archives must be prepared for air-gapped apply runs or verified in the local container runtime. |

## Apply

Use these kinds in apply workflows that mutate or verify target nodes.

| Group | Step Kinds | When to use |
|---|---|---|
| [Host Prep](typed-steps/apply/host-prep.md) | [Swap](typed-steps/apply/host-prep.md#swap), [KernelModule](typed-steps/apply/host-prep.md#kernelmodule), [Sysctl](typed-steps/apply/host-prep.md#sysctl) | Start here for host suitability checks and low-level node prerequisites such as swap, kernel modules, and sysctl settings. |
| [Files and Archives](typed-steps/apply/files-archives.md) | [EnsureDirectory](typed-steps/apply/files-archives.md#ensuredirectory), [WriteFile](typed-steps/apply/files-archives.md#writefile), [CopyFile](typed-steps/apply/files-archives.md#copyfile), [ExtractArchive](typed-steps/apply/files-archives.md#extractarchive), [EditFile](typed-steps/apply/files-archives.md#editfile), [EditTOML](typed-steps/apply/files-archives.md#edittoml), [EditYAML](typed-steps/apply/files-archives.md#edityaml), [EditJSON](typed-steps/apply/files-archives.md#editjson), [CreateSymlink](typed-steps/apply/files-archives.md#createsymlink) | Use this group for file artifacts, node-side file placement, archive extraction, and structured or textual file edits. |
| [Packages and Repositories](typed-steps/apply/packages-repositories.md) | [ConfigureRepository](typed-steps/apply/packages-repositories.md#configurerepository), [RefreshRepository](typed-steps/apply/packages-repositories.md#refreshrepository), [InstallPackage](typed-steps/apply/packages-repositories.md#installpackage) | Use this group for package workflows that start with prepare-time package staging and finish with apply-time repository setup and installation. |
| [Container Images](typed-steps/apply/container-images.md) | [LoadImage](typed-steps/apply/container-images.md#loadimage), [VerifyImage](typed-steps/apply/container-images.md#verifyimage) | Use this group when image archives must be prepared for air-gapped apply runs or verified in the local container runtime. |
| [Container Runtime](typed-steps/apply/container-runtime.md) | [WriteContainerdConfig](typed-steps/apply/container-runtime.md#writecontainerdconfig), [WriteContainerdRegistryHosts](typed-steps/apply/container-runtime.md#writecontainerdregistryhosts) | Use this group when container runtime configuration, registry mirrors, or trust policy must be managed during apply. |
| [Services and Systemd](typed-steps/apply/services-systemd.md) | [WriteSystemdUnit](typed-steps/apply/services-systemd.md#writesystemdunit), [ManageService](typed-steps/apply/services-systemd.md#manageservice) | Use this group when workflows need to install unit files, reload systemd, or start, stop, restart, reload, enable, or disable services. |
| [Kubernetes Lifecycle](typed-steps/apply/kubernetes-lifecycle.md) | [InitKubeadm](typed-steps/apply/kubernetes-lifecycle.md#initkubeadm), [JoinKubeadm](typed-steps/apply/kubernetes-lifecycle.md#joinkubeadm), [UpgradeKubeadm](typed-steps/apply/kubernetes-lifecycle.md#upgradekubeadm), [ResetKubeadm](typed-steps/apply/kubernetes-lifecycle.md#resetkubeadm), [CheckKubernetesCluster](typed-steps/apply/kubernetes-lifecycle.md#checkkubernetescluster) | Use this group for kubeadm bootstrap, join, reset, upgrade, and Kubernetes cluster verification steps. |
| [Waits and Polling](typed-steps/apply/waits-polling.md) | [WaitForService](typed-steps/apply/waits-polling.md#waitforservice), [WaitForFile](typed-steps/apply/waits-polling.md#waitforfile), [WaitForMissingFile](typed-steps/apply/waits-polling.md#waitformissingfile), [WaitForCommand](typed-steps/apply/waits-polling.md#waitforcommand), [WaitForTCPPort](typed-steps/apply/waits-polling.md#waitfortcpport), [WaitForMissingTCPPort](typed-steps/apply/waits-polling.md#waitformissingtcpport) | Use this group when later steps must wait on a specific local condition instead of assuming immediate convergence. |
| [Operator Interaction](typed-steps/apply/operator-interaction.md) | [Confirm](typed-steps/apply/operator-interaction.md#confirm), [Input](typed-steps/apply/operator-interaction.md#input) | Use this group when a workflow needs a clear local checkpoint or an apply-time value that should flow through register outputs. |
| [Advanced](typed-steps/apply/advanced.md) | [Command](typed-steps/apply/advanced.md#command) | Start with typed groups first. Use the advanced group only for vendor tools, custom probes, or one-off local commands that deck does not model directly. |

## Common

Use these kinds in prepare or apply workflows.

| Group | Step Kinds | When to use |
|---|---|---|
| [Host Prep](typed-steps/common/host-prep.md) | [CheckHost](typed-steps/common/host-prep.md#checkhost) | Start here for host suitability checks and low-level node prerequisites such as swap, kernel modules, and sysctl settings. |
| [Operator Interaction](typed-steps/common/operator-interaction.md) | [Message](typed-steps/common/operator-interaction.md#message) | Use this group when a workflow needs a clear local checkpoint or an apply-time value that should flow through register outputs. |
